lrc:
[00:03.24]There was a road inside my heart
[00:22.62]Long before I knew the start
[00:24.84]Every dream would softly call
[00:29.20]Even when I feared the fall
[00:32.92]Every mile I leave behind
[00:36.34]Shapes the person I will find
[00:40.00]Every sunrise leads me on
[00:43.68]To the place where I belong
[00:47.28]Slowly
[00:49.64]Step by step
[00:51.00]I can feel it drawing near
[00:54.52]Every hope
[00:56.88]Every breath
[00:58.10]Makes the picture clear
[01:01.62]There's a home in the sky
[01:05.54]Waiting just for me
[01:08.98]Past the clouds
[01:11.18]Beyond what I can see
[01:16.26]Every road I've ever known
[01:19.62]Leads me to that light
[01:23.10]One more step
[01:25.14]One more dream
[01:28.62]Home in the sky
[01:43.08]I have stumbled
[01:45.26]I have cried
[01:46.64]Still the fire stayed alive
[01:49.98]Every lesson
[01:52.40]Every scar
[01:53.42]Helped me become who I am
[01:57.10]If tomorrow feels unknown
[02:00.46]I'll keep walking on my own
[02:04.18]Trusting every winding road
[02:07.58]Knows exactly where to go
[02:11.72]Maybe dreams
[02:13.30]Take their time
[02:15.12]Maybe stars
[02:16.96]Need the night
[02:18.58]Every journey
[02:20.20]Has a reason
[02:21.98]Every heart
[02:25.10]Can learn to fly
[02:29.02]There's a home in the sky
[02:32.58]Closer every day
[02:35.76]I can see
[02:38.52]A brighter way
[02:43.06]Every dream I've carried here
[02:46.36]Finally takes flight
[02:49.84]One more step
[02:52.00]One more hope
[02:56.76]Home in the sky
